summary: iter214 EchoWaste v1.2 Phase 2 + Notification Preferences testing complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Mobile WasteTab 6-mode selector working, draft-recipe modal functional. Desktop EchoWaste panel with Par Sheet tab working. Notification prefs panel is auth-gated (requires Google sign-in).
seed_data_creation: Created test chef prefs, buffet sessions, menu uploads, draft recipes during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter214 v1.2 Phase 2 features all working: (1) Chef notification prefs - save/get/chefs-to-notify/test-sms all working, phone normalized to E.164; (2) F4 Refill tracking - POST /buffet/{id}/refill and GET /buffet/{id}/refills working; (3) F5 Menu pre-load - POST /events/{id}/menu/upload with mode=text working, GET /events/{id}/menu returns stored menu; (4) F6 Draft recipes - create/promote/reject all working, draft_id starts with 'drec-'; (5) Par Sheet - GET /par-sheet returns par_rows with all required fields; (6) Waste Digest - buffet close includes digest in response, manual trigger works. Twilio SMS correctly queued with reason='no_credentials'. Frontend: Mobile WasteTab has 6 modes (still, buffet_set, buffet_refill, buffet_close, ground_truth, draft_recipe), flash messages work for refill/close without session, draft-recipe modal opens with hint+text inputs. Desktop EchoWaste panel accessible via Events & Catering sidebar, Par Sheet tab shows KPIs and table. Notification prefs panel requires Google auth - component exists at /app/client/components/site/NotificationPrefsRow.tsx and is mounted in GoogleAuthPill avatar menu.

backend_chef_prefs_save.details: POST /api/chef-prefs/prefs saves phone '561-779-6872' normalized to '+15617796872', accepts channels/alerts/quiet_hours

backend_chef_prefs_get.details: GET /api/chef-prefs/prefs returns saved prefs with defaults merged, user_id scoped by X-User-Id header

backend_chefs_to_notify.details: GET /api/chef-prefs/chefs-to-notify returns list of chefs with sms enabled for specified alert

backend_test_sms_queued.details: POST /api/chef-prefs/test-sms returns {ok:false, twilio:{queued:true, reason:'no_credentials'}} as expected

backend_refill_tracking.details: POST /api/waste/buffet/{id}/refill adds refill_cost and increments refill_count. GET /buffet/{id}/refills lists refill entries.

backend_menu_preload.details: POST /api/waste/events/{id}/menu/upload with mode=text extracts menu items. GET /events/{id}/menu returns stored menu.

backend_draft_recipes.details: POST /api/waste/draft-recipes creates draft with ingredients/steps, draft_id starts with 'drec-'. Promote creates approved recipe. Reject sets status=rejected.

backend_par_sheet.details: GET /api/waste/par-sheet returns par_rows with recipe_id, avg_consumed, std_dev, recommended_par, est_par_cost, plus total_par_cost_usd and category_par_cost

backend_waste_digest.details: POST /api/waste/buffet/close includes digest:{ok:true, sent_to:N, message:...} in response. Manual trigger via POST /buffet/{id}/digest works.

frontend_mobile_6_mode_selector.details: Navigate to /m/waste - 6 mode tiles present: mode-still, mode-buffet-set, mode-buffet-refill, mode-buffet-close, mode-ground-truth, mode-draft-recipe

frontend_refill_close_flash.details: Tap mode-buffet-refill or mode-buffet-close without session shows flash 'Start a buffet set first'

frontend_draft_recipe_modal.details: Tap mode-draft-recipe changes CTA to 'Draft new dish (text)', tap CTA opens draft-recipe-modal with hint+text inputs, save enabled after >20 chars

frontend_desktop_parsheet.details: Desktop PanelHost → Events & Catering → EchoWaste → Par Sheet tab shows parsheet-kpis and parsheet-table with par_rows

frontend_notification_prefs.details: Notification prefs panel requires Google sign-in. Component exists at NotificationPrefsRow.tsx and is mounted in GoogleAuthPill avatar menu. Button data-testid='notif-prefs-open' would be visible when authenticated.
